product_names: The Trash Can That Everyone's Talking About
notes: Imported from competitor Meta Ad Library scraper

cards.body: You use your trash can too often for it to look like that. Caraway’s Trash & Recycling Collection brings together a clean, intentional design with a system that actually works—so it finally fits your kitchen.
cards.title: The Trash Can That Everyone's Talking About
